campaign.name: Outcomes Over Tools
campaign.objective: Position AI First Solutions as the outcome-focused partner for mid-market companies, driving 20% more demo requests within 90 days
campaign.targetAudience: Mid-market companies (50–500 employees) with stalled or failed AI initiatives, frustrated by implementation complexity, unclear ROI, and integration friction with existing tech stacks
campaign.positioning: While competitors sell AI software and platforms, we sell proven business outcomes—reduced operational costs, faster time-to-value, and measurable ROI without requiring an in-house AI team
keyMessages: We don't install AI—we make it work for your business
No IT team? No problem. We handle integration with your existing tools
See real ROI in 30 days or we adjust our approach
Turn failed AI attempts into measurable wins
contentThemes: Case studies showing time saved and ROI achieved by similar companies
Implementation roadmaps and checklists for AI adoption without tech teams
Behind-the-scenes breakdowns of why 80% of AI projects fail and how we fix it
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture through thought leadership and readiness assessments
Phase 2: Consideration — nurture with ROI calculators, implementation checklists, and behind-the-scenes educational content
Phase 3: Conversion — webinar demos, case study deep-dives, and personalized readiness consultations
campaign.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture
successMetrics: 15% improvement in organic search visibility for 'AI implementation mid-market' keywords

campaign.name: AI Readiness Assessment
campaign.objective: Capture 500 qualified leads in Q1 through a low-friction readiness assessment funnel
campaign.targetAudience: Mid-market decision makers (CTO, Operations VP, Chief of Staff) evaluating AI adoption but unsure where to start
campaign.positioning: The only AI adoption partner that starts with diagnosing your readiness, not selling tools
keyMessages: Get a free AI readiness assessment—no sales pitch
Discover your biggest AI blockers in 15 minutes
We'll show you exactly where you stand before you spend a dime
Most companies think they're ready. Our assessment reveals what they're missing
contentThemes: The 5 signs your company is not ready for AI (and what to fix first)
What a successful AI readiness assessment looks like with real examples
How to calculate your AI ROI before implementation begins
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — promote the free assessment as a diagnostic tool, not a sales lead magnet
Phase 2: Consideration — send personalized assessment results with tailored roadmap recommendations
Phase 3: Conversion — offer implementation packages based on assessment findings
campaign.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — promote the free assessment as a diagnostic tool

formats: Short case studies showing 200+ hours/week savings
Implementation checklists for companies without IT teams
seoOpportunities: how to adopt AI without an IT team

landingPages.headline: Discover What's Holding Your AI Initiatives Back
landingPages.subheadline: Free 15-minute readiness assessment. No sales pitch. Just honest answers and a clear roadmap.
landingPages.valueProposition: Most companies fail at AI because they start with the wrong tools. We diagnose your readiness first, then build a custom plan.

landingPages.headline: Real Results for Companies Like Yours
landingPages.subheadline: See how mid-market teams saved 200+ hours/week without hiring an AI team.
landingPages.valueProposition: No jargon, no hype—just measurable outcomes from companies your size.

steps.subject: Your AI readiness score is inside (37% of companies are ready)
steps.purpose: Deliver personalized score with 3 immediate wins

steps.subject: The 5 AI blockers you're probably ignoring
How [Similar Company] fixed their AI roadmap
Your 15-minute AI audit is waiting
steps.purpose: Soft CTA to schedule deeper dive

steps.subject: The ROI calculator nobody tells you about
Your case study results are ready
Why that company succeeded (and what you can copy)

salesQualifiedHandoff.sqaThreshold: score >= 65 AND company_size >= 50 AND demo_booked == true
salesQualifiedHandoff.handoffProcess: 1. Slack #sales-qualified webhook fires with enriched lead card 2. AE receives notification within 1 hour (score 80+) or 4 hours (score 65–79) 3. AE reviews assessment results and customizes demo agenda 4. Sales call scheduled within 48 hours
